paymentDetailNoAllocations.en: This payment isn't linked to a sale or receive yet.
paymentDetailNoAllocations.so: Lacagtan weli lama xirin iib ama qaadasho.

bonoAttachedTooltip.so: Bono waa la sawiray — taabo si aad u beddesho

bonoAttachFailedMessage.en: Could not attach the bono. Try again.
bonoAttachFailedMessage.so: Bonoga lama raacin karin. Isku day mar kale.

partyHideConfirmBody.en: They'll be removed from your lists. Any balance and history stay. You can ask support to bring them back.
partyHideConfirmBody.so: Waxaa laga saari doonaa liisaskaaga. Lacagta iyo taariikhda way sii jiri doonaan. Waxaad weydiisan kartaa taageerada inay soo celiyaan.

reportsLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load reports. Check your internet and try again.
reportsLoadFailedMessage.so: Warbixinada lama soo bandhigi karin. Hubi internetkaaga oo isku day mar kale.

reportLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load. Pull down to try again.
reportLoadFailedMessage.so: Ma soo dejin karno. Hoos u jiid si aad mar kale isku daydo.

expenseHistoryLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load expenses. Pull down to try again.
expenseHistoryLoadFailedMessage.so: Kharashka ma soo dejin karno. Hoos u jiid si aad mar kale isku daydo.

paymentHistoryLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load payments. Pull down to try again.
paymentHistoryLoadFailedMessage.so: Lacagaha ma soo dejin karno. Hoos u jiid si aad mar kale isku daydo.

partiesLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load. Pull down to try again.
partiesLoadFailedMessage.so: Ma soo dejin karno. Hoos u jiid si aad mar kale isku daydo.

partiesEmptyMessage.so: Macaamiil ama alaab keene weli ma jiro.

partiesEmptyForQuery.so: Wax la mid ah "{query}" lama helin.

partyNewOpeningBalanceHelper.en: Optional — for old debts from before this app.
partyNewOpeningBalanceHelper.so: Ikhtiyaari — deynta hore ka horeysay app-kan.

customersHeadlineCount.en: {count, plural, =0{No customers with balance} =1{1 customer with balance} other{{count} customers with balance}}
customersHeadlineCount.so: {count, plural, =0{Macmiil deyn leh ma jiro} =1{1 macmiil oo deyn leh} other{{count} macaamiil oo deyn leh}}

suppliersHeadlineCount.en: {count, plural, =0{No suppliers with balance} =1{1 supplier with balance} other{{count} suppliers with balance}}
suppliersHeadlineCount.so: {count, plural, =0{Alaab keene deyn leh ma jiro} =1{1 alaab keene oo deyn leh} other{{count} alaab keene oo deyn leh}}

stockAdjustModeOpeningHelper.en: Stock you had on day one — before this app.
stockAdjustModeOpeningHelper.so: Kayddii aad hore u haysatay ka hor app-kan.

stockAdjustModeAddHelper.en: Stock received outside a bono (e.g. found behind the shelf).
stockAdjustModeAddHelper.so: Kayd la helay oo aan bono ku jirin.

stockAdjustModeSubtractHelper.en: Spoilage, waste, or any loss you can't refund.
stockAdjustModeSubtractHelper.so: Burburin, lumin, ama wax aan dib loo celin karin.

stockAdjustModeSetExactHelper.en: Type the new total after a physical count.
stockAdjustModeSetExactHelper.so: Geli tirada saxda ah ee aad heshay.

stockAdjustUnitCostRequiredMessage.en: Enter the cost per unit so average cost stays correct.
stockAdjustUnitCostRequiredMessage.so: Geli qiimaha xidhmadda si qiimaha celceliska u sii saxo.

stockAdjustFailedMessage.en: Could not save the adjustment. Try again.
stockAdjustFailedMessage.so: Ma keydin karno hagaajinta. Isku day mar kale.

productsHeadline.en: {total, plural, =0{No products yet} =1{1 product} other{{total} products}} · {low} low · {noPrice} without price
productsHeadline.so: {total, plural, =0{Alaab weli ma jiro} =1{1 alaab} other{{total} alaab}} · {low} yaraatey · {noPrice} qiimo la'aan

supabaseConfigMessage.en: Add Supabase URL and anon key to use login. You can still open the prototype screens.
supabaseConfigMessage.so: Ku dar Supabase URL iyo anon key si login loo isticmaalo. Weli waad furi kartaa shaashadaha tijaabada.

loginBody.en: We will send a one-time code. DukanPro can deliver it by WhatsApp from the backend.
loginBody.so: Waxaan kuu diraynaa kood hal mar la isticmaalo, text ama whatsapp.

loginEmailBody.en: We will email you a one-time code.
loginEmailBody.so: Waxaan iimaylkaaga ku soo diri doonnaa kood hal mar la isticmaalo.

ownerOnboardingBody.en: Enter the business and shop names. You can add workers later.
ownerOnboardingBody.so: Geli magaca ganacsiga iyo dukaanka. Shaqaale waad ku dari kartaa marka dambe.

queueCapExceededToast.en: Some old unsynced data was dropped — your phone was offline too long.
queueCapExceededToast.so: Xog hore oo aan la kaydin ayaa la tirtiray — telefoonkaagu wuxuu daahay xagga internet-ka.

signOutPendingDialogBody.en: {count, plural, =1{You have 1 post that has not synced yet.} other{You have {count} posts that have not synced yet.}} Sign out anyway? They will sync the next time you sign in.
signOutPendingDialogBody.so: {count, plural, =1{Waxaad haysataa 1 diiwaan oo aan weli la kaydin.} other{Waxaad haysataa {count} diiwaan oo aan weli la kaydin.}} Ma rabtaa inaad sii baxdo? Markaad mar kale gasho ayaa la kaydin doonaa.

invalidPhoneMessage.en: Enter a valid phone number, for example +252612345678.
invalidPhoneMessage.so: Geli lambar telefoon sax ah, tusaale +252612345678.

invalidEmailMessage.en: Enter a valid email, for example you@example.com.
invalidEmailMessage.so: Geli iimayl sax ah, tusaale you@example.com.

missingPendingPhoneMessage.en: Start with your phone number first.
missingPendingPhoneMessage.so: Marka hore ku bilow lambarka telefoonkaaga.

missingPendingDestinationMessage.en: Start with your phone or email first.
missingPendingDestinationMessage.so: Marka hore ku bilow taleefan ama iimayl.

missingShopNamesMessage.en: Enter both business name and shop name.
missingShopNamesMessage.so: Geli magaca ganacsiga iyo magaca dukaanka labadaba.

sendOtpFailedMessage.en: We could not send the code. Check the phone number or internet and try again.
sendOtpFailedMessage.so: Koodka lama diri karin. Hubi lambarka ama internetka, ka dib mar kale isku day.

sendEmailOtpFailedMessage.en: We could not email the code. Check the address or your internet and try again.
sendEmailOtpFailedMessage.so: Koodka iimaylka lama diri karin. Hubi cinwaanka ama internet-ka, ka dib mar kale isku day.

emailAccountNotFoundMessage.en: No account found for that email. Ask your shop owner to add you.
emailAccountNotFoundMessage.so: Iimaylkaas account uma jiro. Weydiiso milkiilaha dukaanka inuu ku daro.

verifyOtpFailedMessage.en: The code is wrong or expired. Check the code and try again.
verifyOtpFailedMessage.so: Koodku waa khalad ama wuu dhacay. Hubi koodka, ka dib mar kale isku day.

createShopFailedMessage.en: We could not create the shop. Check your internet and try again.
createShopFailedMessage.so: Dukaanka lama abuuri karin. Hubi internetka, ka dib mar kale isku day.

shopLoadFailedMessage.en: Check your internet and try again. If this continues, ask the shop owner to check your access.
shopLoadFailedMessage.so: Hubi internetka, ka dib mar kale isku day. Haddii ay sii socoto, milkiilaha ha kuu hubiyo gelitaanka.

setupStepTemplateBody.en: Pick a starter pack so common items and settings are ready for you.
setupStepTemplateBody.so: Dooro xirmo bilow si waxyaalaha caadiga ah iyo goobaha loo diyaariyo.

setupStepFinishBody.en: Confirm and start using your shop.

applyTemplateFailedMessage.en: Could not apply the template. Check your internet and try again.
applyTemplateFailedMessage.so: Xirmada lama dabaqi karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

templatesEmptyMessage.en: No shop types are available yet. Contact support if this keeps happening.
templatesEmptyMessage.so: Weli ma jiraan noocyo dukaan. La xiriir support haddii ay sii socoto.

completeSetupFailedMessage.en: Could not finish setup. Try again.
completeSetupFailedMessage.so: Diyaarinta lama dhamayn. Isku day mar kale.

settingsSaveFailedMessage.en: Could not save settings. Try again.
settingsSaveFailedMessage.so: Diyaarinta lama keydin karin. Isku day mar kale.

settingsCurrencyLockedMessage.en: Currency can't be changed once the shop has recorded a transaction. Contact support to change it.
settingsCurrencyLockedMessage.so: Lacagta lama beddeli karo marka dukaanku diiwaangeliyo wax ganacsi. La xiriir taageerada si aad u beddesho.

productsEmptyMessage.en: No items yet. Add one from the catalog below.
productsEmptyMessage.so: Alaabo maleh. Kudar hadda liiska guud.

productsLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load products. Check your internet and try again.
productsLoadFailedMessage.so: Alaabo lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

saleEmptyFavoritesMessage.en: Add products from the catalog to see them here.
saleEmptyFavoritesMessage.so: Ku dar alaabo liiska guud si aad halkan ku aragto.

saleSearchEmptyMessage.so: Wax la mid ah “{query}” ma jiraan.

saleLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load items. Check your internet and try again.
saleLoadFailedMessage.so: Alaabo lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

salePostFailedMessage.en: Could not save the sale. Check your internet and try again.
salePostFailedMessage.so: Iibka lama keydin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

saleNeedItemsMessage.en: Add at least one item before saving.
saleNeedItemsMessage.so: Marka hore ku dar ugu yaraan hal shay.

saleNeedCustomerMessage.en: Pick the customer for this debt sale.

customerPickerEmptyMessage.en: No customers yet. Add one when you record a debt sale.
customerPickerEmptyMessage.so: Wali macmiil ma jiro. Ku dar marka aad qorto iib deyn ah.

customerPickerSearchEmptyMessage.so: Macmiil la mid ah “{query}” ma jiro.

customerPickerLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load customers. Check your internet and try again.
customerPickerLoadFailedMessage.so: Macaamiisha lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

partyNewSaveFailedMessage.en: Could not add. Check your internet and try again.
partyNewSaveFailedMessage.so: Luguma dari karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

paymentNeedPartyMessage.en: Pick a {type, select, supplier{supplier} other{customer}} first.
paymentNeedPartyMessage.so: Marka hore dooro {type, select, supplier{alaab keenaha} other{macmiilka}}.

paymentNeedAmountMessage.en: Enter an amount greater than zero.

paymentExceedsBalanceMessage.en: Amount cannot exceed the outstanding balance ({amount}).
paymentExceedsBalanceMessage.so: Lacagtu kama badnaan karto wadarta deynta ({amount}).

paymentPostFailedMessage.en: Could not save the payment. Check your internet and try again.
paymentPostFailedMessage.so: Lacag bixinta lama keydin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

paymentChooseInvoicesChipDone.en: {count, plural, =1{1 invoice chosen} other{{count} invoices chosen}}
paymentChooseInvoicesChipDone.so: {count, plural, =1{1 biil ayaa la doortay} other{{count} biil ayaa la doortay}}

allocationNeedAtLeastOne.en: Choose at least one invoice to apply.
allocationNeedAtLeastOne.so: Doorro biil ugu yaraan mid si aad u adkayso.

allocationLoadFailed.so: Biilasha furan lama soo qaadan karin.

allocationNoOpenInvoices.en: No open invoices for this person.
allocationNoOpenInvoices.so: Biil furan oo qofkan ah ma jiraan.

expenseNeedAmountMessage.en: Enter an amount greater than zero.

expenseLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load categories. Check your internet and try again.
expenseLoadFailedMessage.so: Noocyada lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

expensePostFailedMessage.en: Could not save the expense. Check your internet and try again.
expensePostFailedMessage.so: Qarashka lama keydin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

expenseEmptyMessage.en: No expense categories yet. Pick a shop type in Settings.
expenseEmptyMessage.so: Wali noocyada qarashaadka lama galin. Ka dooro nooca dukaanka meesha Diyaarinta.

saleHistoryEmptyMessage.en: No sales yet. The first SAVE on the Sale screen will land here.
saleHistoryEmptyMessage.so: Wali waxba lama gadin.  Marka hore wax gad.

saleHistoryLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load sales. Check your internet and try again.
saleHistoryLoadFailedMessage.so: Iibka lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

expenseVoidConfirmBody.en: This reverses the expense. It can't be undone.
expenseVoidConfirmBody.so: Tani way ka noqonaysaa kharashka. Lama soo celin karo.

paymentVoidConfirmBody.en: This reverses the payment and reopens what it settled. It can't be undone.
paymentVoidConfirmBody.so: Tani lacagta way tirtiraysaa oo dib u furaysaa wixii la bixiyay. Lama soo celin karo.

saleVoidConfirmBody.en: This will reverse the sale, restore the stock, and clear the customer's debt for it.
saleVoidConfirmBody.so: Iibka waa la tirtiri doonaa, alaabta bakhaarka waa lugu celin doonaa, deynta macmiilkana waa la tirtiri doonaa.

saleVoidRefundExceedsPaidMessage.en: Refund cannot exceed the cash paid ({paid}).
saleVoidRefundExceedsPaidMessage.so: Lacagta la celiyay kama badnaan karto lacagta la bixiyay ({paid}).

saleVoidFailedMessage.en: Could not void this sale. Try again.
saleVoidFailedMessage.so: Iibka lama tirtiri karin. Isku day mar kale.

saleVoidErrorOwnerOnly.en: Only the shop owner can void a sale.
saleVoidErrorOwnerOnly.so: Kaliya milkiilaha dukaanka ayaa tirtiri kara iibka.

saleVoidErrorWindowExpired.en: Too late to void — sales can only be voided within 7 days of posting.
saleVoidErrorWindowExpired.so: Goorta way dhammaatay — iibyada waxaa la tirtiri karaa 7 maalmood gudahood.

saleVoidErrorRefundNeedsCustomer.en: Walk-in sales can't be refunded — there's no customer to refund to.
saleVoidErrorRefundNeedsCustomer.so: Iibyada xayeysiis (walk-in) lama soo celin karo — macmiil aan loogu celiyo ma jiro.

saleVoidErrorRefundExceedsPaid.en: Refund can't be more than the cash paid at the till.
saleVoidErrorRefundExceedsPaid.so: Soo-celintu kama badnaan karto lacagta kaashka.

saleVoidErrorNotFound.en: Sale not found. Pull to refresh and try again.
saleVoidErrorNotFound.so: Iibka lama helin. Cusboonaysii oo isku day mar kale.

receiveHistoryEmptyMessage.en: No receives yet. The first SAVE on the Receive screen will land here.
receiveHistoryEmptyMessage.so: Wali Alaab Lama dejin. Marka hore alaab deji.

receiveHistoryLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load receives. Check your internet and try again.
receiveHistoryLoadFailedMessage.so: Sooyaalka Alaab Keenida lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

receiveDetailLoadFailedMessage.so: Alaab dejintan lama soo dejin karin.

receiveVoidConfirmBody.en: Use this only when you typed the receive wrong. It reverses the receive, removes the stock, and clears what you owe the supplier for it.
receiveVoidConfirmBody.so: Tan u isticmaal kaliya marka aad qaladka u dhigtay alaab dejinta. Alaab dejinta waa la tirtiri doonaa, alaabta bakhaarka waa laga dhimi doonaa, oo lacagta aad alaab keenaha ka qabto waa la tirtiri doonaa.

receiveVoidMistakesOnlyHint.en: Mistakes only. For real returns to the supplier, record a Payment instead.
receiveVoidMistakesOnlyHint.so: Kaliya qaladaad. Haddii aad alaab keenaha wax u celineyso, taas u qor lacag-bixinta.

receiveVoidFailedMessage.en: Could not void this receive. Check your internet and try again.
receiveVoidFailedMessage.so: Alaab dejinta lama tirtiri karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

receiveVoidBlockedStockMessage.en: Some items from this receive have already moved. Void blocked.
receiveVoidBlockedStockMessage.so: Alaabaha alaab dejintan qaarkood mar hore wuu dhaqaaqay. Tirtiridda waa la diiday.

cartClearConfirmTitle.en: Clear {count, plural, =1{1 item} other{{count} items}} from cart?
cartClearConfirmTitle.so: Ka tirtir {count, plural, =1{1 shay} other{{count} shay}} danbiisha?

cartClearConfirmBody.en: This won't undo any saved sale.
cartClearConfirmBody.so: Tan ma noqonayso iib hore loo keydiyay.

lineEditorPriceRequiredHelper.en: Set a price for this item

lineEditorInvalidPriceMessage.so: Geli lambar 0 ama wax ka badan

supplierPickerEmptyMessage.en: No suppliers yet. Add one when you record a receive.
supplierPickerEmptyMessage.so: Alaab keene maleh. Ku dar marka aad qorto alaab dejin.

supplierPickerSearchEmptyMessage.so: Alaab keene la mid ah “{query}” maleh.

supplierPickerLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load suppliers. Check your internet and try again.
supplierPickerLoadFailedMessage.so: Alaab keenayaasha lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

receiveLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load items. Check your internet and try again.
receiveLoadFailedMessage.so: Alaabo lama soo dejin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

receiveEmptyMessage.en: Tap an item to start the receive. Search if it's not in the grid.
receiveEmptyMessage.so: Taabo alaab si aad u bilowdo alaab dejin. Ku raadi haddii aysan ku jirin shabakada.

receiveLinesSummary.so: {count, plural, =0{Wax sadar ah maleh} =1{1 sadar} other{{count} sadar}} · {total}

receiveLinesClearConfirmBody.en: This won't undo any saved receive.
receiveLinesClearConfirmBody.so: Tan ma noqonayso alaab dejin hore loo keydiyay.

receivePostFailedMessage.en: Could not save the receive. Check your internet and try again.
receivePostFailedMessage.so: Alaab dejinta lama keydin karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.

receiveNeedSupplierMessage.so: Dooro alaab keene ka hor inta aadan keydin.

receiveNeedLinesMessage.en: Add at least one line before saving.
receiveNeedLinesMessage.so: Marka hore ku dar ugu yaraan hal sadar.

unitPickerLoadFailedMessage.en: Could not load units. Try again.
unitPickerLoadFailedMessage.so: Halbeegyada lama soo dejin karin. Isku day mar kale.

addNewItemInvalidPriceMessage.so: Geli qiimaha (0 ama wax ka badan)

addNewItemFailedMessage.en: Could not create the item. Try again.
addNewItemFailedMessage.so: Alaabta lama abuuri karin. Isku day mar kale.

addNewItemLoadOptionsFailedHint.en: Could not load suggestions. Pick custom packaging.
addNewItemLoadOptionsFailedHint.so: Soo jeedimaha lama soo dejin karin. Dooro baakad gaar ah.

addPackagingFailedMessage.en: Could not add the packaging. Try again.
addPackagingFailedMessage.so: Baakadda luguma dari karin. Isku day mar kale.

addPackagingNoSuggestionsHint.en: No common packagings yet for this base unit — define your own below.
addPackagingNoSuggestionsHint.so: Halbeegan wali baakado caadi ah uma jiraan — hoosta ka qor mid gaar ah.

addPackagingLoadFailedHint.en: Could not load suggestions. Define your own below.
addPackagingLoadFailedHint.so: Soo jeedimaha lama soo dejin karin. Hoosta ka qor mid gaar ah.

lineEditorCostHintLabel.en: Your last cost: {cost}. Add your usual markup.
lineEditorCostHintLabel.so: Qiimaha aad ku iibsatay ugu dambeysay: {cost}. Ku dar dheeraadkaaga caadi ah.

shopItemEditorReorderThresholdHelper.en: In {unit}. Leave blank for no warning.
shopItemEditorReorderThresholdHelper.so: {unit} ku qor. Ka tag bannaan haddii aadan rabin digniin.

shopItemEditorBarcodeNoMatchToast.en: Code {code} isn't in our catalog yet. Fill in the rest and SAVE.
shopItemEditorBarcodeNoMatchToast.so: Koodhka {code} weli kuma jiro cataloga. Buuxi qaybaha kale, ka dibna KAYDI.

shopItemEditorPrefillBanner.en: Found '{name}' in the catalog — review and tweak anything that's different.
shopItemEditorPrefillBanner.so: Waxaan ka helay '{name}' cataloga — fiiri oo wax ka beddel haddii uu jiro waxa kala duwan.

shopItemEditorSuggestionInShop.en: Already in your shop — tap to open
shopItemEditorSuggestionInShop.so: Horey ayuu dukaankaaga ugu jiray — taabo si aad u furto

shopItemEditorSuggestionInCatalog.en: From global catalog — tap to use
shopItemEditorSuggestionInCatalog.so: Catalog guud — taabo si aad u isticmaasho

shopItemEditorSessionCounter.so: {count, plural, one {1 la daray} other {# la daray}}

packagingEditorMissingUnitMessage.en: Pick a packaging unit (e.g. bag, box).

packagingEditorMissingConversionMessage.en: How many base units fit in this pack? Enter a number greater than 0.
packagingEditorMissingConversionMessage.so: Imisa unug aasaasi ah ayaa ku jira xidhmaddan? Geli tiro ka weyn 0.

shopItemEditorBuySubtitle.en: Default supplier + typical cost — pre-fills Receive later.
shopItemEditorBuySubtitle.so: Alaab keene asaasi + qiimaha caadiga — wuxuu hore u buuxinayaa Qaadasho.

shopItemEditorOpeningSubtitle.en: Enter current stock per packaging so reports are right from day one.
shopItemEditorOpeningSubtitle.so: Geli kayd hadda baakad walba si warbixinada saxda u shaqeeyaan maalintaa.

shopItemEditorOpeningPickBaseUnitFirst.en: Pick a base unit above to enable this section.
shopItemEditorOpeningPickBaseUnitFirst.so: Marka hore dooro cabbir asaasi ah si aad u isticmaasho qaybtan.

shopItemEditorOpeningStockNote.so: Kayd furitaan oo la diiwaan geliyay xilliga hagaajinta.

shopItemEditorOpeningStockFailedMessage.en: Item saved but stock did not save — open the product to adjust.
shopItemEditorOpeningStockFailedMessage.so: Alaabta waa la kaydiyay laakiin kaydka ma kaydsanin — fur alaabta si aad u hagaajiso.

shopItemEditorDedupBody.en: Your shop has similar items. Open one to edit, or keep going if it's something different:
shopItemEditorDedupBody.so: Dukaankaaga wuxuu leeyahay alaab la mid ah. Mid ka fur si aad u tafatirto, ama sii wad haddii uu kala duwan yahay:

shopItemEditorPackagingMissingMessage.en: Fill at least one packaging (price, cost, stock, or barcode).
shopItemEditorPackagingMissingMessage.so: Buuxi ugu yaraan hal qaybsasho (qiime, qarash, kayd, ama barcode).

shopItemEditorDiscoverySubtitle.en: Extra names + bono spelling improve search later.
shopItemEditorDiscoverySubtitle.so: Magacyo kale + qoraalka qoraalka ayaa raadinta ka horumarinaya.

shopItemEditorAliasHelper.en: Names a customer might say. Tap a chip to remove it.
shopItemEditorAliasHelper.so: Magacyada macmiilku oran karo. Riix shukaansiga si aad u saarto.

shopItemEditorBonoSpellingHelper.en: How this item appears on supplier paper invoices (e.g. CCL 330x24).
shopItemEditorBonoSpellingHelper.so: Sida alaabtan u soo muuqato qoraalka warqada keenaha (tusaale CCL 330x24).

deactivateItemConfirmBody.en: It will be removed from Sale, Receive, and Products. Past sales keep it. You can ask support to bring it back.
deactivateItemConfirmBody.so: Waxaa laga saari doonaa Iibinta, Dejinta, iyo Alaabta. Iibkii hore way sii jiri doonaan. Waxaad weydiisan kartaa taageerada inay soo celiyaan.

removePackagingConfirmBody.en: Remove this packaging? You can add it back later.
removePackagingConfirmBody.so: Ma tirtirayaa baakaddan? Mar dambe wad ku celin kartaa.

shopItemEditorSavedAndContinueToast.so: {name} waa la keydiyay — ku dar mid kale

catalogPickerAddButton.so: KU DAR {count, plural, =1{1 shay} other{{count} shay}}

catalogPickerAddedToast.so: {count, plural, =1{1 shay} other{{count} shay}} ayaa la daray

setupOnboardingBody.en:
We added {count} items from the {template} template. You can start selling now — prices fill in as you sell.

Or take a minute to:
setupOnboardingBody.so:
Waxaan kuugu darnay {count} alaab oo ka mid ah qaabka {template}. Hadda iibi waad bilaaban kartaa — qiimayaashu way buuxin doonaan markaad iibinayso.

Ama daqiiqad ku qaad:

setupOnboardingSetPricesTitle.so: Qiime u Samee Alaabta Caanka ah

setupOnboardingSetPricesBody.en: So sales don't pause for a price prompt
setupOnboardingSetPricesBody.so: Si aanu iibku u dhabaalayn qiimo weydiin

setupOnboardingBrowseCatalogBody.en: Activate more items from our list
setupOnboardingBrowseCatalogBody.so: Ka dhaqaaji alaabo dheeraad ah liiskayaga

scannerHoldSteady.en: Hold steady — 15 to 25 cm from the code
scannerHoldSteady.so: Si toosan u qabo — 15 ilaa 25 cm meel jeegga

multiScanUnknownCount.en: {count, plural, =1{1 unknown code — review after} other{{count} unknown codes — review after}}
multiScanUnknownCount.so: {count, plural, =1{1 jeeg lama yaqaano — eeg ka dib} other{{count} jeeg lama yaqaano — eeg ka dib}}

multiScanEmptyHint.en: Aim at a barcode. Successful scans stage as lines below.
multiScanEmptyHint.so: Jeegga camera-da hor dhig. Akhrida guul leh waxay galayaan liiska hoose.

multiScanLongPressHint.so: Si dheer u taabo si aad u multi-akhrido

multiScanAppliedSummary.en: {count, plural, =1{1 line staged} other{{count} lines staged}}
multiScanAppliedSummary.so: {count, plural, =1{1 saf la gallinay} other{{count} saf la galiyay}}

relativeTimeMinutesAgo.en: {minutes, plural, =1{1 min ago} other{{minutes} min ago}}
relativeTimeMinutesAgo.so: {minutes, plural, =1{1 daqiiqo ka hor} other{{minutes} daqiiqo ka hor}}

relativeTimeHoursAgo.en: {hours, plural, =1{1 hr ago} other{{hours} hr ago}}
relativeTimeHoursAgo.so: {hours, plural, =1{1 saac ka hor} other{{hours} saac ka hor}}

relativeTimeDaysAgo.en: {days, plural, =1{1 day ago} other{{days} days ago}}
relativeTimeDaysAgo.so: {days, plural, =1{1 maalin ka hor} other{{days} maalmood ka hor}}

storageSyncFreeUpSpaceConfirmBody.en: This refreshes prices and lists from the server. Your saved sales aren't touched.
storageSyncFreeUpSpaceConfirmBody.so: Tani waxay cusbooneysiisaa qiimaha iyo liiska serfarka. Iibyada aad kaydisay ma taabankaro.

storageSyncResyncConfirmTitle.so: Dib u soo deji xogta oo dhan?

storageSyncResyncConfirmBody.en: Fetches a fresh copy of items, customers, and recent transactions from the server. Your saved sales aren't touched.
storageSyncResyncConfirmBody.so: Waxaa la soo dejinayaa nuqul cusub oo ka kooban alaab, macaamiil, iyo wax iibinta dhowaan. Iibyada aad kaydisay ma taabankaro.

storageSyncResyncDoneToast.so: Xogta oo dhan dib ayaa loo soo dejiyay

storageSyncSyncedToast.en: {count, plural, =0{Already up to date} =1{Synced 1 post} other{Synced {count} posts}}
storageSyncSyncedToast.so: {count, plural, =0{Horeyba u cusub} =1{1 la diray} other{{count} la diray}}

storageSyncSyncFailedToast.en: Could not sync — check your connection.

storageSyncPushedToast.so: {count, plural, =1{La diray 1 sugaya} other{La diray {count} sugaya}}

storageSyncPulledToast.so: {count, plural, =1{La helay 1 cusbooneysiin} other{La helay {count} cusbooneysiin}}

storageSyncPushedAndPulledToast.so: La diray {pushed} sugaya, la helay {pulled} cusbooneysiin

storageSyncResetConfirmBody.en: This DELETES all data this device has downloaded from the server. Your shop's data will be re-downloaded on next sync. Any sales that haven't been sent will be lost. Only do this if support tells you to.
storageSyncResetConfirmBody.so: Tani waxay TIRTIRTAA dhammaan xogta uu taleefankaan ka soo dejiyey serverka. Xogta dukaankaaga waxaa dib loo soo dejin doonaa marka xiga ee la xidhiidho. Iibyada aan loo dirin server-ka way lumi doonaan. Tan hel kaliya marka taageerada ay ku weydiisto.

storageSyncResetTypePrompt.so: Ku qor TIRTIR si aad u xaqiijiso

storageSyncResetOfflineBlocker.en: Connect to internet first — you have pending sales that need to send before reset.
storageSyncResetOfflineBlocker.so: Marka hore internet-ka ku xidh — waxaa jira iibyo sugaya in la diro server-ka kahor dib-u-dejinta.

storageSyncResetPendingFailedBlocker.en: {count, plural, =1{1 post couldn't send. Review it in Failed posts before reset.} other{{count} posts couldn't send. Review them in Failed posts before reset.}}
storageSyncResetPendingFailedBlocker.so: {count, plural, =1{1 dirka ayaa fashilmay. Eeg Iibyo guuldarreystay ka hor dib-u-dejinta.} other{{count} dir ayaa fashilmay. Eeg Iibyo guuldarreystay ka hor dib-u-dejinta.}}

storageSyncResetDoneToast.en: Local data reset. Downloading fresh data...
storageSyncResetDoneToast.so: Xogta maxalliga waa la dib u dejiyey. Soo dejinta xog cusub...

manageCategoriesEmpty.en: No categories yet. Tap + to add one.
manageCategoriesEmpty.so: Wali qaybo ma jiraan. Taabo + si aad u darto.

manageCategoriesHideConfirmBody.en: It will no longer appear when adding or editing items. Items already using it keep it until you change them.
manageCategoriesHideConfirmBody.so: Mar dambe kama soo bixi doonto marka aad alaab dartid ama wax ka beddeshid. Alaabta hadda isticmaasha way sii haysanaysaa ilaa aad beddesho.

failedPostsDiscardConfirmBody.so: Ma soo celin kartid. Sii wad?

syncFirstTimeSetupTitle.en: Connect to load your shop's data

syncFirstTimeSetupBody.en: We need to fetch your items, customers, and recent transactions one time before you can work offline. Open Wi-Fi or mobile data, then tap Retry.
syncFirstTimeSetupBody.so: Waxaan mar u baahanahay inaan soo dejino alaabtaada, macaamiishaada, iyo wax iibinta dhowaan ka hor inta aanad shaqayn karin marka aad offline-tahay. Fur Wi-Fi ama internet-ka taleefanka, ka dibna taabo MAR KALE.

syncFirstTimeLoadingBody.en: Loading your items, customers, and recent activity. This only happens once.
syncFirstTimeLoadingBody.so: Waxaa la soo dejinayaa alaabtaada, macaamiishaada, iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyada dhowaan. Tani hal mar ayey dhacaysaa.

syncIssueBannerLabel.en: ⚠ Working offline since {time}. Tap to retry sync.
syncIssueBannerLabel.so: ⚠ Offline tan iyo {time}. Taabo si aad mar kale isku daydid.

syncForceSyncedToast.en: {count, plural, =0{Already up to date} =1{Synced 1 update} other{Synced {count} updates}}
syncForceSyncedToast.so: {count, plural, =0{Horeyba u cusub} =1{1 cusboonaysiis la diray} other{{count} cusboonaysiis la diray}}

syncForceFailedToast.so: Lama is-waafajin karin — mar kale isku day.
